node.statement: STEP: Apply Weingarten calculus for Haar(q): E_U[(U⊗U*)^{⊗2}] = Σ_{π,σ∈S_2} Wg_{π,σ}(q)|π⟩⟩⟨⟨σ|. The Gram matrix is G_{π,σ}(q) = ⟨⟨π|σ⟩⟩ with G = ((q^2,q),(q,q^2)), and Wg = G^{-1}. Ground truth: main.tex line 146 contains the formula with Wg_{\pi,\sigma}(q)|\pi\rangle\!\rangle\langle\!\langle\sigma|.
